invalidCases.name: negative inventory
invalidCases.expected: inventoryLimit must be a non-negative safe integer

invalidCases.name: duplicate audit sequence
invalidCases.expected: audit-log sequence is not strictly monotonic

invalidCases.name: inconsistent request counter
invalidCases.expected: request total disagrees with the audit log

invalidCases.name: inconsistent approval counter
invalidCases.expected: inventory usage and approved decisions disagree

invalidCases.name: inconsistent error counter
invalidCases.expected: error total disagrees with the audit log

invalidCases.name: privacy boundary flag
invalidCases.expected: privacy boundary flag is not false

invalidCases.name: raw wallet in report
invalidCases.expected: privacy statement contains a raw wallet address

invalidCases.name: email in report
invalidCases.expected: privacy statement contains an email address

invalidCases.name: unsupported decision reason
invalidCases.expected: decision reason code is missing or unsupported
